info.name: Mowdmin Mobile BE API
info.description: Postman collection for Mowdmin Mobile BE API with login and token handling.

request.description: Initializes a Stripe PaymentIntent and returns the `clientSecret` used by the frontend to pop up the Stripe UI.
Admin endpoint to view all registered payments with optional query parameters to filter by state.
Allows an admin or privileged system to forcefully update a payment status (e.g. bypass Stripe if manual verification occurred). Note: This does NOT trigger Stripe side-effect routing.

header.description: The cryptographic signature provided by Stripe. The server validates this against the `STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET` environment variable.

request.description: This endpoint shouldn't typically be called via Postman, as Stripe requires the strictly calculated cryptographical signature of the raw buffer payload. Use the Stripe CLI instead: `stripe listen --forward-to localhost:3000/api/v1/payment/webhooks/stripe` to trigger this locally.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Faith and Works",
    "description": "Understanding James 2",
    "category_id": "{{categoryId}}",
    "type": "video",
    "media_url": "https://example.com/faith.mp4",
    "author": "Pastor John",
    "duration": "35:00",
    "is_downloadable": true,
    "thumbnail": "https://example.com/thumb.jpg",
    "isLive": false
}
